mapper.select:
select distinct A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,A.DATA_TYPE ,A.DATA_LEN ,A.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,A.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN A.STOR_FMT is null AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select A.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN A.STOR_FMT is null AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select A.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE A.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,A.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from (select T.*, D.ALLOW_VAL_LST, D.DATA_TYPE, D.DATA_LEN, D.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN, D.STOR_FMT, D.EXPR_FMT_LST, UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_TERMS T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN D on T.DOMAIN_NM = D.DOMAIN_NM) A where 1=1
AND (A.TERMS_NM ILIKE #{schNm} || '%' OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM ILIKE #{schNm} || '%')
AND (A.TERMS_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm})
AND (A.TERMS_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%' OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%')
AND A.DOMAIN_NM ILIKE '%' || #{searchDomain} || '%'
AND (A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ILIKE #{searchEngTerm} || '%')
AND (A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ILIKE '%' || #{searchEngTerm})
AND (A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ILIKE '%' || #{searchEngTerm} || '%')
AND A.APRV_YN = #{schAprvYn}
order by A.TERMS_NM

select distinct A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,B.DATA_TYPE ,B.DATA_LEN ,B.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,B.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE B.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,B.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from (select *, UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_TERMS) A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN B on A.DOMAIN_NM = B.DOMAIN_NM where A.TERMS_NM = #{termsNm} OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM = #{termsNm}

select A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,B.DATA_TYPE ,B.DATA_LEN ,B.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,B.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE B.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,B.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_TERMS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN B on A.DOMAIN_NM = B.DOMAIN_NM where A.TERMS_NM = #{termsNm} OR #{termsNm} = any(A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST)

select A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,B.DATA_TYPE ,B.DATA_LEN ,B.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,B.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN B.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' WHEN STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN B.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' ELSE B.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,B.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_TERMS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN B on A.DOMAIN_NM = B.DOMAIN_NM where A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM = #{termsEngAbrvNm}
SELECT T.TERMS_ID ,T.TERMS_NM ,T.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,T.DOMAIN_NM ,T.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,D.DATA_TYPE ,D.DATA_LEN ,D.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN FROM TB_TERMS T LEFT JOIN TB_DOMAIN D ON T.DOMAIN_NM = D.DOMAIN_NM

SELECT T.TERMS_ID ,T.TERMS_NM ,T.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,T.TERMS_DESC ,T.DOMAIN_NM ,T.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,D.DATA_TYPE ,D.DATA_LEN ,D.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN FROM TB_TERMS T LEFT JOIN TB_DOMAIN D ON T.DOMAIN_NM = D.DOMAIN_NM
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_TERMS WHERE TERMS_ID IN
#{item.id}
mapper.select:
select distinct A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,A.DATA_TYPE ,A.DATA_LEN ,A.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN A.STOR_FMT is null AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select A.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN A.STOR_FMT is null AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select A.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE A.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,A.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from (select T.*, D.ALLOW_VAL_LST, D.DATA_TYPE, D.DATA_LEN, D.STOR_FMT, D.EXPR_FMT_LST, UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_TERMS T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN D on T.DOMAIN_NM = D.DOMAIN_NM) A where A.CODE_GRP is not null
AND (A.TERMS_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%' OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%')
AND A.APRV_YN = #{schAprvYn}
order by A.TERMS_NM

select distinct A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,B.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE B.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,B.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from (select *, UNNEST(CASE WHEN array_length(ALLOPH_SYNM_LST, 1) >= 1 THEN ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ELSE '{null}'::text[] END ) as ALLOPH_SYNM from TB_TERMS) A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN B on A.DOMAIN_NM = B.DOMAIN_NM where A.CODE_GRP is not null AND (A.TERMS_NM ILIKE #{codeNm} OR A.ALLOPH_SYNM ILIKE #{codeNm})

select A.TERMS_ID ,A.TERMS_NM ,A.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM ,A.TERMS_DESC ,A.DOMAIN_NM ,B.ALLOW_VAL_LST ,CASE WHEN B.STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR' -- VARCHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 이내 문자' from dual) WHEN STOR_FMT is null AND B.DATA_TYPE = 'CHAR' -- CHAR THEN (select B.DATA_LEN||'자리 문자' from dual) ELSE B.STOR_FMT END as STOR_FMT ,B.EXPR_FMT_LST ,A.CODE_GRP ,A.CHRG_ORG ,A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST ,A.COMM_STND_YN ,A.MAGNTD_ORD ,A.APRV_YN ,A.APRV_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,A.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDT_DT ,A.UPDT_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(A.APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT ,A.REQ_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.REQ_SYS_CD) as REQ_SYS_NM from TB_TERMS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DOMAIN B on A.DOMAIN_NM = B.DOMAIN_NM where A.CODE_GRP is not null AND (A.TERMS_NM = #{codeNm} OR #{codeNm} = any(A.ALLOPH_SYNM_LST))
